response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience and a strong background in embedded systems, networking, and security-related technologies. However, his resume lacks direct experience with the specific embedded networking domain, Linux kernel modification, or Japanese language proficiency required for this role. His expertise in C is limited to general software development rather than embedded firmware or kernel-level programming.
strengths: Strong background in embedded systems and low-level programming (C++, D, Java)
Experience with networking technologies (HTTP, microservices, real-time data handling)
Proven ability to develop and maintain complex software systems (e.g., GISCollective platform)
concerns: No explicit experience with Linux kernel modification or source-code changes
Lacks Japanese language proficiency (a strict requirement)
Limited direct experience with security technologies relevant to embedded networking (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X)
